title: Stash, Cherry-pick, and Release Tag
description: Save work-in-progress with stash, cherry-pick a bug fix commit, and create an annotated release tag.
starterCode:
# (1) Stash your current changes with a descriptive message
# YOUR COMMAND HERE

# (2) Cherry-pick the commit with SHA abc1234 onto the current branch
# YOUR COMMAND HERE

# (3) Pop the stash to restore your work-in-progress
# YOUR COMMAND HERE

# (4) Create an annotated tag v2.1.0 with message "Release v2.1.0"
# YOUR COMMAND HERE

# (5) Push the tag to origin
# YOUR COMMAND HERE
solutionCode:
# (1) Stash current changes with a message
git stash push -m "WIP: feature improvements"

# (2) Cherry-pick the bug fix commit onto current branch
git cherry-pick abc1234

# (3) Restore the stashed work-in-progress
git stash pop

# (4) Create an annotated release tag
git tag -a v2.1.0 -m "Release v2.1.0"

# (5) Push the tag to origin
git push origin v2.1.0
hints: Use git stash push -m "message" to save changes with a helpful description
git cherry-pick followed by the exact SHA applies that commit's diff onto your current branch
git stash pop both applies and removes the top stash entry — use git stash apply if you want to keep the entry on the stack
Annotated tags require the -a flag and a -m message; they store full metadata and are the best practice for releases
You can push a single tag with git push origin <tagname> or push all tags with git push origin --tags

validationRules.errorMessage: Restore stashed changes with git stash pop
Create an annotated tag with git tag -a

simulatedOutput.success:
[Stash] Saved working directory and index state On main: WIP: feature improvements

[main 7d4f2a1] Fix critical null pointer bug (cherry-picked)

On branch main: restored stashed changes

Tag v2.1.0 created
To https://github.com/alice/my-project.git
 * [new tag]         v2.1.0 -> v2.1.0
simulatedOutput.failure: ERROR: Validation failed. Ensure you stash your changes, cherry-pick abc1234, pop the stash, create an annotated tag v2.1.0, and push it to origin.
